model_specification_line: model = smf.wls("full_time ~ eligible * post + age_2012_c + age_2012_c_sq + C(statefip) + C(year) + lfpr + unemp + driverslicenses + everify + securecommunities", data=analysis_df, weights=analysis_df["perwt"]).fit(cov_type="cluster", cov_kwds={"groups": analysis_df["statefip"]})
